---
title: "Rapport de Segmentation MAESTRO"
subtitle: "Carte forestiere dense a 0.2m (NDP0)"
author: "Package maestro"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y - %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
    fig_width: 10
    fig_height: 7
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
params:
  aoi_path: "data/aoi.gpkg"
  output_dir: "outputs"
  backbone_path: NULL
  decoder_path: "segmenter_ndp0_best.pt"
  millesime_ortho: NULL
  millesime_irc: NULL
  dem_channels: !r c("SLOPE", "TWI")
  use_s2: FALSE
  use_s1: FALSE
  date_sentinel: NULL
  gpu: FALSE
  run_segmentation: TRUE
  use_flair: FALSE
  model_flair: "IGNF/FLAIR-INC_rgbi_15cl_resnet34-unet"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
project_root <- tryCatch(
  rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file(),
  error = function(e) {
    candidate <- normalizePath(file.path(getwd(), "..", ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
    if (file.exists(file.path(candidate, "DESCRIPTION"))) candidate
    else getwd()
  }
)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = project_root)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = TRUE,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "100%"
)
library(maestro)
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(fs)
has_ggplot2 <- requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)
if (has_ggplot2) {
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
}
```

# 1. Zone d'etude (AOI)

```{r aoi}
aoi <- load_aoi(params$aoi_path)
aoi_l93 <- sf::st_transform(aoi, 2154)
bbox <- sf::st_bbox(aoi_l93)
surface_ha <- as.numeric(sf::st_area(sf::st_union(aoi_l93))) / 10000

cat(sprintf("  Entites    : %d\n", nrow(aoi)))
cat(sprintf("  CRS        : %s\n", sf::st_crs(aoi_l93)$Name))
cat(sprintf("  Emprise    : [%.0f, %.0f] - [%.0f, %.0f]\n",
            bbox["xmin"], bbox["ymin"], bbox["xmax"], bbox["ymax"]))
cat(sprintf("  Surface    : %.2f ha\n", surface_ha))
```

```{r carte-aoi, fig.cap="Zone d'etude"}
plot(sf::st_geometry(aoi_l93), col = "#228B2244", border = "#228B22", lwd = 2,
     main = "AOI - Zone d'etude", axes = TRUE)
```

# 2. Donnees d'entree

## 2.1 Orthophotos IGN (RGBI)

```{r ortho}
ortho <- download_ortho_for_aoi(
  aoi_l93, params$output_dir,
  millesime_ortho = params$millesime_ortho,
  millesime_irc = params$millesime_irc
)
```

```{r rgbi}
rgbi <- combine_rvb_irc(ortho$rvb, ortho$irc)
cat(sprintf("  Image RGBI: %d x %d px, %d bandes\n",
            terra::ncol(rgbi), terra::nrow(rgbi), terra::nlyr(rgbi)))
```

```{r plot-rgbi, fig.cap="Ortho RVB et IRC (fausses couleurs)"}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
terra::plotRGB(ortho$rvb, r = 1, g = 2, b = 3, main = "Ortho RVB")
terra::plotRGB(ortho$irc, r = 1, g = 2, b = 3, main = "Ortho IRC (PIR-R-V)")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

## 2.2 Modele Numerique de Terrain (DEM)

Les canaux DEM selectionnes : **`r paste(params$dem_channels, collapse = " + ")`**

```{r dem}
dem_data <- download_dem_for_aoi(aoi_l93, params$output_dir,
                                  dem_channels = params$dem_channels)
dem <- dem_data$dem
cat(sprintf("  DEM: %d x %d px, %d bandes (%s)\n",
            terra::ncol(dem), terra::nrow(dem), terra::nlyr(dem),
            paste(names(dem), collapse = ", ")))
```

```{r plot-dem, fig.cap="Canaux DEM"}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
terra::plot(dem[[1]], main = params$dem_channels[1],
            col = hcl.colors(50, "Viridis"))
terra::plot(dem[[2]], main = params$dem_channels[2],
            col = hcl.colors(50, "Plasma"))
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

```{r stats-dem}
dem_stats <- data.frame(
  Canal = names(dem),
  Min = round(sapply(1:terra::nlyr(dem), function(i)
    min(terra::values(dem[[i]]), na.rm = TRUE)), 2),
  Max = round(sapply(1:terra::nlyr(dem), function(i)
    max(terra::values(dem[[i]]), na.rm = TRUE)), 2),
  Moyenne = round(sapply(1:terra::nlyr(dem), function(i)
    mean(terra::values(dem[[i]]), na.rm = TRUE)), 2),
  Ecart_type = round(sapply(1:terra::nlyr(dem), function(i)
    sd(terra::values(dem[[i]]), na.rm = TRUE)), 2)
)
knitr::kable(dem_stats, caption = "Statistiques des canaux DEM")
```

## 2.3 Indices spectraux

```{r ndvi, fig.cap="NDVI et masque de vegetation"}
ndvi <- compute_ndvi(rgbi)
veg_mask <- mask_vegetation(rgbi)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
terra::plot(ndvi, main = "NDVI",
            col = colorRampPalette(c("#d73027", "#fee08b", "#1a9850"))(100))
terra::plot(veg_mask, main = "Vegetation (NDVI >= 0.3)",
            col = c("#D3D3D3", "#228B22"), legend = FALSE)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

ndvi_vals <- terra::values(ndvi, na.rm = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("  NDVI: min=%.3f, max=%.3f, moyenne=%.3f\n",
            min(ndvi_vals), max(ndvi_vals), mean(ndvi_vals)))
cat(sprintf("  Couverture vegetale (NDVI >= 0.3): %.1f%%\n",
            mean(terra::values(veg_mask, na.rm = TRUE)) * 100))
```

```{r sentinel-s2, eval=params$use_s2, results='asis'}
cat("\n## 2.4 Sentinel-2\n\n")
```

```{r download-s2, eval=params$use_s2}
s2 <- download_s2_for_aoi(aoi_l93, params$output_dir,
                            date_cible = params$date_sentinel)
if (!is.null(s2)) {
  cat(sprintf("  Sentinel-2: %d bandes, %d x %d px\n",
              terra::nlyr(s2), terra::ncol(s2), terra::nrow(s2)))
  terra::plotRGB(s2, r = 4, g = 3, b = 2, stretch = "lin",
                 main = "Sentinel-2 RGB")
}
```

```{r sentinel-s1, eval=params$use_s1, results='asis'}
cat("\n## 2.5 Sentinel-1\n\n")
```

```{r download-s1, eval=params$use_s1}
s1 <- download_s1_for_aoi(aoi_l93, params$output_dir,
                            date_cible = params$date_sentinel)
if (!is.null(s1) && !is.null(s1$s1_asc)) {
  cat(sprintf("  Sentinel-1 ASC: %d bandes (VV, VH)\n", terra::nlyr(s1$s1_asc)))
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  terra::plot(s1$s1_asc[[1]], main = "S1 Ascendant - VV")
  terra::plot(s1$s1_asc[[2]], main = "S1 Ascendant - VH")
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
}
```

# 3. Segmentation MAESTRO

## 3.1 Configuration du modele

```{r config-model}
cls <- classes_ndp0()
knitr::kable(cls, caption = "10 classes NDP0 (Nomenclature Dense Produit 0)")
```

```{r palette-ndp0, fig.cap="Palette de couleurs NDP0", fig.height=3}
par(mar = c(1, 8, 2, 1))
barplot(rep(1, nrow(cls)), horiz = TRUE, col = cls$couleur,
        names.arg = cls$classe, las = 1, border = NA,
        main = "Classes NDP0", xaxt = "n")
```

## 3.2 Execution de la segmentation

```{r segmentation, eval=params$run_segmentation}
t_start <- Sys.time()

# Configurer Python (gerer le cas ou hfhub l'a deja initialise)
tryCatch(
  configurer_python(),
  error = function(e) message("  Note Python: ", e$message)
)

# Construire les modalites
modalites <- list(aerial = rgbi)
if (!is.null(dem_data)) modalites$dem <- dem_data$dem

if (params$use_s2 && exists("s2") && !is.null(s2)) {
  modalites$s2 <- aligner_sentinel(s2, rgbi, target_res = 10)
}
if (params$use_s1 && exists("s1") && !is.null(s1)) {
  if (!is.null(s1$s1_asc)) {
    modalites$s1_asc <- aligner_sentinel(s1$s1_asc, rgbi, target_res = 10)
  }
  if (!is.null(s1$s1_des)) {
    modalites$s1_des <- aligner_sentinel(s1$s1_des, rgbi, target_res = 10)
  }
}

# Charger le segmenter
segmenter <- charger_segmenter(
  backbone_path = params$backbone_path,
  decoder_path = normalizePath(params$decoder_path, mustWork = FALSE),
  modalites = names(modalites),
  gpu = params$gpu
)

# Executer la segmentation
raster_seg <- executer_segmentation(
  segmenter = segmenter,
  modalites = modalites,
  aoi = aoi_l93,
  output_dir = params$output_dir,
  patch_size = 250L,
  resolution = 0.2,
  overlap_m = 10,
  gpu = params$gpu
)

t_end <- Sys.time()
duree <- difftime(t_end, t_start, units = "mins")
cat(sprintf("\n  Duree de segmentation: %.1f minutes\n", as.numeric(duree)))
```

```{r load-seg, eval=!params$run_segmentation}
# Charger un resultat existant
seg_path <- file.path(params$output_dir, "segmentation_ndp0.tif")
if (file.exists(seg_path)) {
  raster_seg <- terra::rast(seg_path)
  message("  Resultat charge: ", seg_path)
} else {
  stop("Aucun resultat de segmentation trouve dans ", params$output_dir)
}
```

# 4. Resultats

## 4.1 Carte de segmentation

```{r carte-seg, fig.cap="Carte de segmentation NDP0 a 0.2m"}
cls <- classes_ndp0()
codes_presents <- sort(unique(terra::values(raster_seg, na.rm = TRUE)))
palette <- cls$couleur[cls$code %in% codes_presents]

terra::plot(raster_seg, main = "Segmentation NDP0 (0.2m)",
            col = palette, type = "classes",
            levels = cls$classe[cls$code %in% codes_presents])
```

```{r carte-overlay, fig.cap="Superposition segmentation / orthophoto"}
terra::plotRGB(ortho$rvb, r = 1, g = 2, b = 3, stretch = "lin")
seg_resamp <- terra::resample(raster_seg, ortho$rvb, method = "near")
# Masquer le non-foret pour l'overlay
seg_foret <- seg_resamp
seg_foret[seg_foret == 9] <- NA
terra::plot(seg_foret, col = adjustcolor(cls$couleur[1:9], alpha.f = 0.5),
            add = TRUE, legend = FALSE)
title("Segmentation sur orthophoto (foret uniquement)")
```

## 4.2 Distribution des classes

```{r stats-classes}
stats_seg <- compute_landcover_stats(raster_seg, classes = cls)
stats_seg <- stats_seg[order(stats_seg$code), ]

knitr::kable(
  stats_seg[, c("code", "classe", "type", "n_pixels", "proportion", "surface_ha")],
  caption = "Statistiques par classe NDP0",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r barplot-classes, fig.cap="Distribution des essences forestieres", fig.height=5}
# Exclure non-foret pour le graphique des essences
stats_foret <- stats_seg[stats_seg$code < 9, ]

if (nrow(stats_foret) > 0) {
  if (has_ggplot2) {
    p <- ggplot(stats_foret, aes(x = reorder(classe, -surface_ha),
                                   y = surface_ha, fill = classe)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(stats_foret$couleur, stats_foret$classe)) +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Surface (ha)",
           title = "Repartition des essences forestieres") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10))
    print(p)
  } else {
    par(mar = c(8, 4, 3, 1))
    barplot(stats_foret$surface_ha, names.arg = stats_foret$classe,
            col = stats_foret$couleur, las = 2,
            ylab = "Surface (ha)", main = "Repartition des essences forestieres")
  }
}
```

```{r pie-type, fig.cap="Feuillus vs Resineux", fig.height=4}
type_stats <- aggregate(surface_ha ~ type, data = stats_seg[stats_seg$code < 9, ], sum)
if (nrow(type_stats) > 0) {
  couleurs_type <- c(feuillu = "#228B22", resineux = "#FF8C00")
  pie(type_stats$surface_ha, labels = sprintf("%s\n%.2f ha", type_stats$type, type_stats$surface_ha),
      col = couleurs_type[type_stats$type],
      main = "Proportion feuillus / resineux")
}
```

## 4.3 Analyse topographique par essence

```{r topo-dem, fig.cap="Statistiques DEM par classe"}
# Utiliser le DTM pour l'analyse altitudinale si disponible
# Sinon utiliser la premiere bande DEM
dem_analyse <- dem[[1]]

cross <- cross_landcover_dem(raster_seg, dem_analyse, classes = cls)
cross <- cross[order(cross$code), ]

knitr::kable(
  cross[, c("classe", "alt_mean", "alt_min", "alt_max", "alt_sd", "n_pixels")],
  caption = sprintf("Statistiques %s par classe", params$dem_channels[1]),
  col.names = c("Classe", "Moyenne", "Min", "Max", "Ecart-type", "N pixels"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r boxplot-topo, fig.cap="Distribution topographique par essence", fig.height=6}
# Echantillonner pour les boxplots (eviter memoire)
seg_vals <- terra::values(raster_seg, na.rm = FALSE)[, 1]
dem1_vals <- terra::values(
  terra::resample(dem[[1]], raster_seg, method = "bilinear"),
  na.rm = FALSE
)[, 1]
dem2_vals <- terra::values(
  terra::resample(dem[[2]], raster_seg, method = "bilinear"),
  na.rm = FALSE
)[, 1]

valid <- !is.na(seg_vals) & !is.na(dem1_vals) & seg_vals < 9
n_sample <- min(sum(valid), 100000)
idx <- sample(which(valid), n_sample)

df_topo <- data.frame(
  classe = cls$classe[match(seg_vals[idx], cls$code)],
  canal1 = dem1_vals[idx],
  canal2 = dem2_vals[idx]
)

if (has_ggplot2) {
  p1 <- ggplot(df_topo, aes(x = reorder(classe, canal1, median), y = canal1, fill = classe)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(cls$couleur[cls$code < 9],
                                         cls$classe[cls$code < 9])) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = params$dem_channels[1],
         title = paste(params$dem_channels[1], "par essence")) +
    theme_minimal()

  p2 <- ggplot(df_topo, aes(x = reorder(classe, canal2, median), y = canal2, fill = classe)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(cls$couleur[cls$code < 9],
                                         cls$classe[cls$code < 9])) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = params$dem_channels[2],
         title = paste(params$dem_channels[2], "par essence")) +
    theme_minimal()

  print(p1 / p2)
} else {
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(8, 4, 3, 1))
  boxplot(canal1 ~ classe, data = df_topo, las = 2, col = cls$couleur[cls$code < 9],
          ylab = params$dem_channels[1], main = paste(params$dem_channels[1], "par essence"))
  boxplot(canal2 ~ classe, data = df_topo, las = 2, col = cls$couleur[cls$code < 9],
          ylab = params$dem_channels[2], main = paste(params$dem_channels[2], "par essence"))
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
}
```

## 4.4 NDVI par essence

```{r ndvi-essence, fig.cap="Distribution du NDVI par essence", fig.height=5}
ndvi_vals <- terra::values(
  terra::resample(ndvi, raster_seg, method = "bilinear"),
  na.rm = FALSE
)[, 1]

df_ndvi <- data.frame(
  classe = cls$classe[match(seg_vals[idx], cls$code)],
  ndvi = ndvi_vals[idx]
)
df_ndvi <- df_ndvi[!is.na(df_ndvi$ndvi), ]

if (has_ggplot2) {
  p <- ggplot(df_ndvi, aes(x = reorder(classe, ndvi, median), y = ndvi, fill = classe)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(cls$couleur[cls$code < 9],
                                         cls$classe[cls$code < 9])) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "NDVI", title = "NDVI par essence forestiere") +
    theme_minimal()
  print(p)
} else {
  par(mar = c(8, 4, 3, 1))
  boxplot(ndvi ~ classe, data = df_ndvi, las = 2, col = cls$couleur[cls$code < 9],
          ylab = "NDVI", main = "NDVI par essence forestiere")
}
```

# 5. Contrainte FLAIR (feuillus / resineux)

```{r flair-section, eval=params$use_flair, results='asis'}
cat("La classification FLAIR (CoSIA 19 classes) est utilisee pour contraindre\n")
cat("la segmentation MAESTRO : les pixels identifies comme *conifere* par FLAIR\n")
cat("ne conservent que les essences resineuses, et inversement pour les *feuillus*.\n")
```

```{r flair-inference, eval=params$use_flair}
message("  Lancement de l'inference FLAIR...")
flair_result <- pipeline_flair_contrainte(
  raster_seg  = raster_seg,
  rgbi        = rgbi,
  output_dir  = params$output_dir,
  model_flair = params$model_flair,
  gpu         = params$gpu
)
raster_seg_orig <- raster_seg
raster_seg <- flair_result$raster
```

```{r flair-stats, eval=params$use_flair}
knitr::kable(flair_result$stats,
             caption = "Corrections appliquees par la contrainte FLAIR",
             row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r flair-compare, eval=params$use_flair, fig.cap="Comparaison avant / apres contrainte FLAIR", fig.height=5}
cls <- classes_ndp0()
codes_orig <- sort(unique(terra::values(raster_seg_orig, na.rm = TRUE)))
codes_flair <- sort(unique(terra::values(raster_seg, na.rm = TRUE)))

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
terra::plot(raster_seg_orig, main = "MAESTRO (original)",
            col = cls$couleur[cls$code %in% codes_orig], type = "classes",
            levels = cls$classe[cls$code %in% codes_orig])
terra::plot(raster_seg, main = "MAESTRO + FLAIR",
            col = cls$couleur[cls$code %in% codes_flair], type = "classes",
            levels = cls$classe[cls$code %in% codes_flair])
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

```{r flair-diff, eval=params$use_flair, fig.cap="Pixels modifies par la contrainte FLAIR", fig.height=5}
# Carte des pixels modifies
diff_rast <- raster_seg_orig != raster_seg
diff_rast[is.na(diff_rast)] <- 0
terra::plot(diff_rast, main = "Pixels corriges par FLAIR",
            col = c("#EEEEEE", "#FF4444"), legend = FALSE)
legend("topright", legend = c("Inchange", "Corrige"),
       fill = c("#EEEEEE", "#FF4444"), border = NA)

n_corr <- sum(terra::values(diff_rast, na.rm = TRUE))
n_tot <- sum(!is.na(terra::values(raster_seg_orig)))
cat(sprintf("\n  Pixels corriges: %d / %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            n_corr, n_tot, n_corr / n_tot * 100))
```

```{r flair-stats-apres, eval=params$use_flair}
# Recalculer les stats apres contrainte
stats_seg <- compute_landcover_stats(raster_seg, classes = cls)
stats_seg <- stats_seg[order(stats_seg$code), ]

knitr::kable(
  stats_seg[, c("code", "classe", "type", "n_pixels", "proportion", "surface_ha")],
  caption = "Statistiques par classe NDP0 (apres contrainte FLAIR)",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

# 6. Donnees de sortie

```{r fichiers-sortie}
out_files <- fs::dir_info(params$output_dir, recurse = FALSE)
out_files <- out_files[order(-out_files$size), ]
out_df <- data.frame(
  Fichier = basename(out_files$path),
  Taille = format(out_files$size, big.mark = " "),
  Modifie = format(out_files$modification_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
)
knitr::kable(out_df, caption = "Fichiers generes", row.names = FALSE)
```

# 7. Resume

```{r resume}
surface_foret <- sum(stats_seg$surface_ha[stats_seg$code < 9])
essence_dom <- stats_seg$classe[stats_seg$code < 9][which.max(stats_seg$surface_ha[stats_seg$code < 9])]

cat("=== Resume de la segmentation ===\n\n")
cat(sprintf("  AOI             : %s\n", basename(params$aoi_path)))
cat(sprintf("  Surface totale  : %.2f ha\n", surface_ha))
cat(sprintf("  Surface foret   : %.2f ha (%.1f%%)\n",
            surface_foret, surface_foret / surface_ha * 100))
cat(sprintf("  Essence dominante: %s (%.2f ha)\n",
            essence_dom, max(stats_seg$surface_ha[stats_seg$code < 9])))
cat(sprintf("  Modalites       : %s\n",
            paste(c("aerial (RGBI)", paste0("dem (", paste(params$dem_channels, collapse="+"), ")"),
                    if (params$use_s2) "Sentinel-2",
                    if (params$use_s1) "Sentinel-1"), collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("  Resolution      : 0.2m\n"))
cat(sprintf("  Classes NDP0    : %d classes detectees / 10\n",
            length(codes_presents)))
if (exists("duree")) {
  cat(sprintf("  Duree           : %.1f minutes\n", as.numeric(duree)))
}
```

# 8. Session

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
